backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features related to adding, displaying, and imaging a 'Car Care Kit Box' bundle product, with associated file targets and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each file's role in the REGIS NANO CHEMICALS React app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'REGIS NANO CHEMICALS' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application file that configures TanStack Router with five routes (Home, About, Products, HowToUse, Contact) nested under a shared Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Shared footer component rendering brand identity, quick navigation links, social media icons, and company contact info with a yellow accent bar and dark blue background.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky responsive navigation header with brand logo, desktop nav links with active highlighting, a 'Get in Touch' CTA button, mobile hamburger menu, and scroll-aware shadow.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper that composes the Header, Footer, and TanStack Router Outlet with proper top padding to account for the fixed header.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: A React component that renders a product card with image, price, badges, and an optional bundle details section including included products list and savings ribbon.
frontend/src/data/instructions.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and exports an array of step-by-step usage instructions for four car care products.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Defines the Product interface and exports a static array of five car care products, including individual items and a bundle kit with pricing data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, switching between anonymous and authenticated actors based on the current Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useFadeIn.ts: A React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a visibility flag when an element scrolls into view, enabling fade-in animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A placeholder file with no active exports, reserved for future backend query hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind layers, defines brand CSS custom properties, and declares utility classes for animations and brand-specific styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: The About page component featuring a hero banner, brand story section, and a values checklist, with scroll-triggered fade-in animations via useFadeIn.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a hero section, contact details (email, phone, location), and a validated form with name, email, phone, and message fields that shows a success state after simulated submission.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home landing page featuring a hero section with branding and CTAs, a features grid highlighting nano technology benefits, and a product showcase pulling from the products data file.
frontend/src/pages/HowToUse.tsx: How-to-use guide page that renders step-by-step instructions for each product from the instructions data file, using a dynamic icon map and alternating card styles per product.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products listing page that separates bundle/combo products from individual products and renders them in distinct sections using the ProductCard component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors (blue, yellow, gray), fonts (Poppins, Inter), box shadows, border radii, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 5) for the REGIS NANO CHEMICALS multi-page React website, documenting brand design system, existing features, known issues, and image requirements.
